message: I was poking around Ready.gov the other day and found their power outage section—turns out there's actually some straightforward stuff I hadn't thought through, like what temp to keep the fridge at and how long food stays safe. It's one of those quiet preparations that makes a real difference without being dramatic. What's your go-to move when the power goes out—do you have a plan, or are you more of a wing-it person?
